description: Ably is a realtime application infrastructure platform for pub/sub messaging, chat, synchronization, and related realtime features. It provides hosted services and tooling for managing applications and messaging resources.
summary: Ably exposes a documented Control REST API with an OpenAPI spec at `https://control.ably.net/v1`, plus an npm-distributed `ably` CLI authenticated either by CLI OAuth login or an Ably access token via `ABLY_ACCESS_TOKEN`.
